summary: Iteration 8 testing complete. All Bug Report system features verified: Bug Report button in header (visible on all pages), dropdown with priority buttons, page auto-detect, description textarea, submit functionality, Bug Reports page with stats cards and filters, status change dropdown. Contact Us section on Login page verified with correct email (Xac@Xyzservices.co.za) and mailto link. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Report system implemented correctly with all required features
WhatsApp send attempts to forward bug reports to 27603245830 - may fail if no WA session connected but report still saves to DB
Contact Us section properly styled with lime-400 color for email link
Bug Reports nav item correctly restricted to admin users only
seed_data_creation: Test bug reports created during testing (prefixed with TEST_BUG and UI_TEST)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features all working: (1) Bug Report button (bug icon) in header bar next to notification bell - visible on all pages, (2) Bug Report dropdown with Priority buttons (Critical, High, Medium, Low), Page auto-detect, Description textarea, Submit button, (3) POST /api/bug-reports creates report and attempts WhatsApp send to 27603245830, (4) GET /api/bug-reports returns all reports (admin only), (5) PUT /api/bug-reports/{id} updates status, (6) Bug Reports page at /bug-reports shows stats cards (Total, Open, In Progress, Resolved, Critical), (7) Bug Reports page has priority and status filter dropdowns, (8) Bug Reports nav item visible in sidebar for admin users, (9) Status can be changed via dropdown (Open → In Progress → Resolved), (10) Contact Us section on Login page with Xac@Xyzservices.co.za email and 'More details to follow' text.
